SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST.
